properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 108/13
1.RIGLIST. CORRECT AT 061830UTC NOV 13. 
   NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.
    73-27.1N 024-24.2E LEIV ERIKSSON
    72-26.9N 020-18.4E WEST HERCULES                
    66-04.5N 008-14.5E TRANSOCEAN SPITSBERGEN 
    65-07.0N 006-40.3E DEEPSEA BERGEN
NOTES:
    A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METRE SAFETY ZONE.
    B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N, REFER TO NAVAREA I 
       WARNINGS OR VISIT WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW
2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 106/13
